name: Foil Envelope Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a sheet of tin foil into a 12 x 16 inch rectangle.
2. Place the sliced green pepper, tomato, and green onion on the lower half of the foil sheet.
3. Sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon basil, salt, and white pepper.
4. Place the filet of firm white fish on top of the vegetables.
5. Sprinkle with the remaining basil, salt, and white pepper.
6. Top with lemon slices.
7. Fold the upper half of the foil over the fish and vegetables.
8. Double fold the edges of the foil to create a tight 1/2 inch seal.
9. Place the foil envelope on a baking sheet and bake at 450°F for 15 minutes, or until the envelope puffs.
10. To serve, cut an "X" in the top of the envelope and carefully unfold the foil.
